name: Contribution Score
summary: Scores how much value a user adds through comments: recent, upvoted comments count more; self-serving or downvoted ones count less. Optional bonus when the project owner upvotes.
description:
**How it works:**
- Each comment gets a **base score** (`comment_base_score`). Votes adjust it: upvotes add `comment_upvote_weight`, downvotes subtract `comment_downvote_weight`.
- **Self-serving** activity (own project, replying to yourself) is discounted by `self_interaction_penalty_factor` (0 = full penalty, 1 = no penalty).
- **Time decay**: `engagement_window_months` (comments older than this → weight 0) and `monthly_decay_rate_percent` (weight drops each month).
- Optional **project-owner upvote bonus**: if the project owner upvoted the comment, score is multiplied by `project_owner_upvote_bonus_multiplier`.

**Inputs:**
- No manual file upload. Data is fetched from DeepFunding Portal APIs.

**Output:**
- Per-user contribution score (CSV: `user_id`, `contribution_score`) plus an optional JSON details file with per-comment breakdown for debugging.

inputs.label: Comment Base Score
inputs.description: Baseline points for creating a comment.

inputs.label: Comment Upvote Weight
inputs.description: Points added per upvote on a comment.

inputs.label: Comment Downvote Weight
inputs.description: Points subtracted per downvote on a comment.

inputs.label: Self Interaction Penalty Factor
inputs.description: Multiplier for self-related comments (own project or same-user reply). 0 = maximum penalty, 1 = no penalty.

inputs.label: Project Owner Upvote Bonus Multiplier
inputs.description: Bonus multiplier applied when the project owner upvoted the comment (1 = no bonus).

inputs.label: Engagement Window (Months)
inputs.description: Comments older than this many months contribute 0. Must be between 1 and 72.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: Decay per month bucket (0 = no decay, 100 = full decay). Each month reduces weight by this percentage.

outputs.label: Contribution Score by User
outputs.description: Per-user CSV with columns: user_id (DeepFunding user ID), contribution_score (numeric score).

outputs.label: Contribution Score Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-user breakdown including per-comment scoring components and intermediate values. For debugging and auditing.
